title: ageratina iltisii
intro: Ageratina iltisii, also known as Hill's angelica tree, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Central America and Mexico. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ageratina iltisii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
